sections.paragraph:
Original: צוּרישׁדּי

Transliteration: tsûrı̂yshadday

Phonetic: tsoo-ree-shad-dah'-ee

BDB Definition:

Zurishaddai = "my rock is almighty"
  1. father of Shelumiel, the chief of the Simeonites at the time of the exodus

Origin: from H6697 and H7706

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
